ai_summary: A static SVG illustration from the Campsite design system showcasing a dark-themed UI interface. This minimal, flat design renders as a browser or application window mockup with dark color palette (#171717, #262626) and serves as a visual preview asset commonly used in component marketplaces, landing pages, and theme selection interfaces for developer tools and SaaS products.
